operations.rationale: Edge must be dropped before removing regulatory complexity factor as user instructed.
User requested full removal of regulatory complexity from the model.
Introduces a direct competitive threat/risk channel.
Creates a causal path: increased competitor response reduces gained market share.
Strengthens investment effect on revenue as user requested; this makes direct capex more influential for revenue growth.

warnings: Removing fac_regulations leaves risk_operational with a single inbound driver (fac_europe_entry). If you wish to model other operational risks, consider adding more drivers.

out_market_share now has three inbound edges: fac_europe_entry (0.7), fac_competition (-0.3), fac_competitor_response (-0.25), total Σ|mean|=1.25, which exceeds the recommended 1.0. If you prefer to keep all three, consider weakening one or redistributing their weights.

coaching.summary: Three model changes: added a new competitor response factor directly affecting market share, removed regulatory complexity and its operational risk edge, and made investment more central to revenue. This will increase the influence of investment and competitive dynamics in scenario results. Market share now may be somewhat overspecified—review edge strengths if needed.
